phrases.situation: Sɛ wopɛ sɛ woka kyerɛ obi sɛ green apple no asa, na wowɔ red apple a, sɛɛ na woka no wɔ English mu.
phrases.target: The green apples are finished, but I have red ones.
phrases.gloss: Green apple no asa, nanso mewɔ red bi.

phrases.situation: Sɛ ɔtɔfoɔ bisa boɔ a, sɛɛ na wobɛbua no.
Sɛ wopɛ sɛ woka sɛ wobɛtew boɔ no so kakra a.
phrases.target: I can reduce it a little for you.
phrases.gloss: Metumi atew so kakra ama wo.

phrases.situation: Sɛ ɔtɔfoɔ pɛ sɛ ɔtua ka wɔ MoMo so a, sɛɛ na woka.
phrases.target: You can pay with mobile money.

phrases.situation: Sɛ wopɛ sɛ woda obi ase sɛ watɔ bi a.
